mnemonics.title: Storm Architecture - NSZ
mnemonics.content:
Remember 3 components with 'NSZ':

N - Nimbus (master)
S - Supervisor (worker)
Z - ZooKeeper (coordination)

Think: 'NSZ - Need Storm Zookeeper'

mnemonics.title: Stream Groupings - SFAG
mnemonics.content:
Remember 4 main groupings with 'SFAG':

S - Shuffle (random)
F - Fields (by key)
A - All (broadcast)
G - Global (single task)

Think: 'SFAG groups the Stream Flow And Guarantees delivery'
